titles: "그 계좌로 사면 끝장이야" ETF 사는 법, 절세 계좌, 포트폴리오까지 이 영상 하나로 끝
같은 ETF인데 세금 77만 원 vs 0원 — ISA·연금저축·IRP 완벽 정리
ETF 첫 매수 5분 가이드 — 호가창·지정가·리밸런싱까지 한 번에
thumbnail_texts: 그 계좌로 사면 끝장 / 세금 77만원 vs 0원
따라만 하면 된다 / 첫 매수 완벽 가이드

character_poses.1: REACT-02 걱정 경고 — 세금 77만원 경고 긴장감
character_poses.2: INTRO-07 메모하며 정리 — 절세 3종 체크리스트 톤
character_poses.3: INTRO-06 커피들고 인사 — 친근 실전 가이드 톤

meta.design_rule: 상단 47% 이미지 + 하단 53% 순검정 (미리캔버스 노랑 2줄 텍스트 자리). 스컹크 벡터 스타일. 말풍선 라벨 자리는 이미지 상단 좌우 여백에 확보.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 1 — 스컹크 걱정 경고(REACT-02). 중앙 스컹크가 이마에 땀방울 흘리며 양손 깍지 끼고 걱정. 좌우 분할 배경: 왼쪽 빨간 세금 폭탄 아이콘 + 77만원 표시 동전 산, 오른쪽 초록 ISA 방패 아이콘 + 0원 표시. 가운데 'VS' 구분선. 하단 53% 순검정.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, big round shiny eyes with worried anxious expression, small pink nose, a single sweat drop on forehead, both paws clasped together in anxiety. Clean vector illustration style, thick outlines, soft shading. The skunk is positioned in the CENTER of the upper frame, half body shot, facing forward. The background is split LEFT vs RIGHT by a bold golden 'VS' divider: on the LEFT side, a large red tax bomb icon with a lit fuse, surrounded by a pile of golden coins being drained away into red flames, deep crimson glow atmosphere. On the RIGHT side, a large glowing green shield icon representing a tax-saving account, with golden coins staying safely inside the shield, bright emerald green glow atmosphere. Small stylized financial document icons float around each side. Background base: deep navy blue gradient with subtle grid pattern. Upper 47% of the frame contains all visual elements. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance. Absolutely no text, no letters, no words, no numbers, no watermark anywhere in the image. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio, YouTube thumbnail composition, high saturation vivid colors with strong red vs green contrast.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 2 — 스컹크 메모 정리(INTRO-07). 좌측 스컹크가 노트에 체크 표시 그리며 정리 중. 우측에 3개 절세 계좌 카드 진열: ISA(파랑), 연금저축(금색), IRP(초록) 카드. 각 카드 위에 작은 동전 더미와 체크마크. 위쪽에 세액공제 화살표. 하단 53% 순검정.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, big round shiny eyes with focused studious expression behind small round glasses, small pink nose, sitting pose. Clean vector illustration style, thick outlines, soft shading. The skunk is positioned on the LEFT side of the upper frame, half body shot, holding a large notebook on the lap with one paw writing a check mark with a yellow pencil. On the RIGHT side: three stylized account card icons arranged in a fan layout — a blue card representing a tax-exempt savings account, a gold card representing a retirement savings account, a green card representing an individual retirement pension card. Each card has a small pile of golden coins on top and a glowing check mark. Above the cards, a cluster of small upward golden arrows representing tax deduction refunds. Background: warm beige to navy blue gradient with subtle grid pattern and soft sparkle particles. Upper 47% of the frame contains all visual elements. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance. Absolutely no text, no letters, no words, no numbers, no readable card labels anywhere in the image. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio, YouTube thumbnail composition, high saturation vivid colors.

thumbnails.concept_ko: 컨셉 3 — 스컹크 커피 인사(INTRO-06). 좌측 스컹크가 커피 머그 들고 친근하게 손 흔들기. 우측에 대형 스마트폰 목업 — 증권앱 호가창(매수/매도 호가 바)과 큰 매수 버튼, 옆에 체크리스트 아이콘 4개. 친근하고 따뜻한 톤. 하단 53% 순검정.
thumbnails.prompt_en: Cute chibi skunk character with black and white fur, big round shiny eyes with warm friendly smile, small pink nose, wearing a casual striped sweater. Clean vector illustration style, thick outlines, soft shading. The skunk is positioned on the LEFT side of the upper frame, half body shot, holding a steaming coffee mug in one paw and waving the other paw in a welcoming gesture. On the RIGHT side: a large realistic smartphone mockup tilted slightly, the screen displays a stylized stock trading app interface with a visible bid-ask order book showing horizontal bars in red and blue, and a prominent large green BUY button highlighted with a soft glow (no readable text on button). Beside the phone, four small floating checklist sticker icons with check marks in a vertical stack. Background: soft cream to navy blue gradient with warm golden bokeh and cozy atmosphere. Upper 47% of the frame contains all visual elements. CRITICAL COMPOSITION RULE: The lower half of the frame is reserved for text overlay. The bottom 53% of the image (more than half the total frame height) must be pure solid black (#000000) completely empty flat void. This is larger than a typical half-and-half split. The gradient transition starts at the 45% line (from top) and must be fully solid black by the 60% line. The remaining bottom 40% is 100% pure black with absolutely zero visual elements — no gradient, no texture, no shadows, no details, pure #000000 flat void. Think of it as: TOP ZONE (upper 47% height) contains ALL the imagery and subject, BOTTOM ZONE (lower 53% height) is a dedicated solid black text panel. Prioritize this composition rule above aesthetic balance. Absolutely no text, no letters, no words, no numbers, no readable app labels anywhere in the image. Wide 16:9 aspect ratio, YouTube thumbnail composition, warm inviting colors.
